news.headline: Pound drops as UK yields rise, signaling presence of bond vigilantes.
Circus SE unveils 2025 strategy focused on Physical AI leadership in food-service industry. Order backlog exceeds 8,600 units.
news.summary: In Hamburg, Germany, Circus SE (XETRA: CA1), known for its Physical AI applications in the food-service sector, has announced its 2025 strategy. The company aims to further advance the use of Physical AI to spearhead the evolution of AI applications and promote autonomy in labor-heavy sectors. Following a successful 2024, during which Circus initiated mass production of its autonomous CA-1 robot and received orders for over 8,600 units, the company is set to transform manual-intensive industries.

O2 Czech Republic partners with Allot Ltd to provide cybersecurity through Allot DNS Secure for consumer customers.
news.summary: In Hod Hasharon, Israel, on January 09, 2025, Allot Ltd. shared news that O2 Czech Republic, a subsidiary of the PPF Group, has rolled out Allot DNS Secure. This move by Allot Ltd. (NASDAQ: ALLT) (TASE: ALLT), a key player in global network intelligence and converged network-native security solutions, allows O2 Czech Republic to improve cybersecurity offerings for their mobile and fixed broadband consumer customers. With this launch, O2 Czech Republic aims to provide enhanced protection services to its customer base.

news.headline: TikTok faces potential ban in the U.S. on Jan. 19, impacting billions in ad revenue. Creators and brands rush to adapt.
news.summary: TikTok, a popular social media platform, serves as a conduit for billions of dollars in advertising revenue. This platform is facing a potential ban in the United States by January 19. In response to this looming threat, brands and content creators are hurrying to make necessary arrangements and adjustments to their marketing strategies.

news.headline: Supreme Court to decide on TikTok case, balancing national security and free speech. Arguments on Friday in challenge to ban law.
news.summary: On Friday, the court will listen to arguments regarding a law that prohibits the app, which has resulted in conflicting rulings in the past when balancing these two interests.

French 20 Yr 2.5% OAT Auction
Stax LLC appoints Peter Rodrigues-Renon as Director of EMEA Value Creation Practice, focusing on commercial due diligence for private equity firms.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in New York City, a renowned global strategy consulting firm called Stax LLC shared exciting news via PRNewswire. Stax LLC focuses on commercial due diligence, value creation, and exit planning for various financial entities such as private equity firms, PE-backed companies, hedge funds, and investment banks. The firm happily declared the selection of Peter to a notable position within their organization.

news.headline: French 10 Yr 3% OAT Auction
Private equity firm Lion Equity Partners acquires Global Compression Services from Warren Equipment Company, leading distributor of parts/components for natural gas engines. #Denver #Acquisition
news.summary: A private equity firm based in Denver, Lion Equity Partners, specialized in corporate carve-outs, completed the acquisition of Global Compression Services (GCS) from Warren Equipment Company located in Midland, Texas. GCS, a prominent distributor globally, deals with OEM and aftermarket parts for reciprocating natural gas engines and compressors. The company also manufactures unique components.

news.headline: Verne appoints Michele Tagliatti as CFO, with 10+ years experience in data centers. Will drive financial strategy.
news.summary: Verne, a prominent provider of sustainably powered HPC data centers in the Nordics, has named Michele Tagliatti as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Tagliatti, who has amassed more than a decade of experience in the data center, telecommunications, and technology industries, is set to leverage his expertise in his new role. By devising a results-oriented financial strategy, Tagliatti aims to play a crucial role in Verne's growth trajectory. This move underscores the company's commitment to strategic financial planning as it expands its operations.

Controversial White House rules for A.I. global spread spark resistance from tech industry; regulations to impact worldwide.
news.summary: The technology sector is resisting upcoming regulations that are anticipated to ensure advanced technology remains within the United States and its allies.

DAMAC CEO in process of securing funding for US data center deal, details to be finalized.
Banks' lobbying succeeds, major proposal derailed. Top regulator stepping down as they prep for Trump's return.
news.summary: The proposal, which faced strong opposition from banks, was ultimately defeated with the help of lobbying efforts. Following this development, a key regulator revealed plans to relinquish his leadership position this week.

TCL CSOT debuts advanced smart cockpit display solutions at CES 2025, showcasing innovations in automotive display tech.
news.summary: At the CES 2025 event in Las Vegas on January 9, TCL CSOT, a prominent player in display technology, will present its state-of-the-art automotive display solutions. The exhibit will highlight pioneering advancements in smart cockpit technology. Within their automotive display zone, TCL CSOT will showcase three innovative solutions, emphasizing their commitment to pushing the boundaries of display technology in the automotive sector.

news.headline: LLCP to invest in Zero100, a community organization, with Founders & existing management. - Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: In London on January 9, 2025, Levine Leichtman Capital Partners (LLCP), a worldwide private equity firm, revealed their decision to provide a growth investment in Zero100 Community Limited (Zero100). This investment is being made in collaboration with the Company's Founders and current stakeholders.

news.headline: Vantage Foundation partners with Grab Indonesia on Wiramudi Grab program to empower women, announced on Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: In Jakarta, Indonesia, on January 9, 2025, Vantage Foundation revealed its collaboration with Grab Indonesia on December 19, 2024. The partnership aims to endorse the Wiramudi Grab initiative, which focuses on boosting women's empowerment by providing opportunities to earn income through flexible working hours.

news.headline: 2024 ez1095 software from Halfpricesoft.com allows processing of ACA forms, including unlimited 1095 & 1094 forms for one flat rate. Developers have just updated the software with the latest IRS E File schema.
news.summary: A company in Redmond, Washington, has announced that they are offering unlimited printing of Paper, PDF, and E-file options for 1095 & 1094 forms for a flat rate. The software has been IRS approved since 2015, and their latest update in January 2025 includes the newest IRS E-File schema. This update allows clients to conveniently file their forms using the updated software.

Ultimovacs ASA had a successful extraordinary general meeting on January 9, 2025, with all agenda matters approved.
news.summary: Today in Oslo, Ultimovacs ASA conducted an extraordinary general meeting on January 9, 2025. During the meeting, all agenda items were successfully approved.

Photocat A/S and Essity partner to launch eco-friendly InnoLig+© dust-suppression solution in main European markets.
Jyske Realkredit A/S will list new Covered Bonds on 10th January 2025; Final terms to be announced.
news.summary: On the 9th of January 2025, a correction was made regarding ISIN DK0009416893 as a Realkreditobligation (RO) at Nasdaq Copenhagen A/S. The final terms for the bonds to be listed on the 10th of January 2025 by Jyske Realkredit A/S are now available. These new Covered Bonds (SDO) have specific terms detailed in the attached announcement.

news.headline: Openreach selects Nokia to build fiber network for faster broadband access, connecting millions.
news.summary: Openreach has selected Nokia to construct an open-access fiber network aimed at connecting millions to quicker broadband services. This initiative focuses on enhancing connectivity in numerous locations across the UK. The project aims to establish a high-speed network that will benefit approximately [important number] homes and businesses. The collaboration between Openreach and Nokia is anticipated to significantly improve internet accessibility for a vast number of people, paving the way for enhanced connectivity and communication services in the region.

news.headline: Yum China ranked #1 globally in Restaurant & Leisure Facilities for 5th year, on Dow Jones Sustainability Index.
news.summary: Today, on January 9, 2025, Yum China Holdings, Inc. disclosed that it has secured the top spot globally in the Restaurant & Leisure Facilities Industry for corporate sustainability. The company, identified by the symbols NYSE: YUMC and HKEX: 9987, was recognized in the S&P Global 2024 rankings.

news.headline: Bhutan's region stores Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB Coin in strategic reserve for economic growth, embracing cryptos, states CZ Zhao.
news.summary: A special administrative region in Bhutan has revealed plans to diversify its strategic reserve by including Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), and BNB Coin (BNB). Gelephu Mindfulness City, located in the Himalayan nation, made this announcement to ensure smooth trading and mitigate liquidity risks. Bitcoin holds the top spot, followed by Ethereum in second place, and BNB in fifth place among the most valuable cryptocurrencies. This move aims to enhance economic resilience and bolster capabilities in Bitcoin mining. In a related update, the US Government has reportedly consented to sell off $6.5 billion worth of confiscated crypto assets, including Bitcoin.

news.headline: Kremlin on Trump's Remarks About Greenland and Canada: The arctic is a zone of our strategic national interests.
Coinbase discloses CFTC subpoena tied to Polymarket, may share user account info in response.
news.summary: Coinbase, a popular cryptocurrency exchange platform, is facing a potential obligation to provide specific user account details to the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) in connection with a subpoena linked to Polymarket. This request for information is part of an ongoing investigation, highlighting the regulatory scrutiny within the digital currency space. The extent and nature of the data requested, including details on the number of user accounts affected, remains undisclosed. This development underscores the increasing regulatory oversight surrounding cryptocurrency transactions.

news.headline: Kremlin on Trump's Remarks About Greenland and Canada: Europe is reacting very timidly, very cautiously, almost in a whisper.
Kremlin on Trump's remarks about Greenland and Canada: We are watching very closely the rather dramatic development of the situation.
Changhong dominates CES 2025 with AI tech in smart TVs, fridges, etc., asserting global leadership in intelligent tech.
news.summary: In Las Vegas from January 7-10, 2025, Changhong is excited to participate in CES 2025. The company is presenting a range of Al-enabled products at the event, such as smart TVs, refrigerators, air conditioners, a washer-dryer pair, and complete smart home solutions.

news.headline: BIGO Ads partners with Unity LevelPlay, integrating ads for developers, expanding revenue opportunities.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in Singapore, BIGO Ads SDK has been officially recognized as a bidding partner for Unity LevelPlay, a prominent mediation platform. This partnership allows developers to boost their revenue by leveraging BIGO Ads' extensive ad inventory and LevelPlay's substantial traffic. This collaboration offers developers the opportunity to maximize their earnings by accessing a wide range of ad opportunities on LevelPlay through BIGO Ads SDK.

news.headline: BoE DMP Survey: Firms' expected year-ahead wage growth remained at 4% on a three-month moving-average basis in December.
BoE DMP Survey: Asked about NICS rise, 61% of firms expect to lower profit margins, 54% expect to raise prices, 53% expect lower employment and 39% expect to pay lower wages.
Arf and LuLu Financial Holdings partner for T-0 settlement, focusing on global payments solutions.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, in Zurich and Abu Dhabi, a strategic partnership was formed between Arf, a prominent provider of working capital and settlement liquidity solutions for payments firms, and LuLu Financial Holdings, a major player in the global financial services sector. This collaboration signifies a significant step in their shared mission to enhance capabilities and expand reach in the industry.

news.headline: UK DMP 1 Yr CPI Exp. Actual 3% (Forecast 2.8%, Previous 2.8%)
UK 3M year-ahead output prices Actual 3.8%, Forecast 3.7%.

Franklin Covey (NYSE:FC) stock drops by nearly 8% after missing Q1 estimates. Management remains optimistic, reaffirming future guidance. CEO highlights 218% revenue growth per client to $85k. Company focuses on client penetration and logo-hunting.
news.summary: Franklin Covey Co. (NYSE:FC) saw a 7.93% drop in after-hours trading due to missed first-quarter estimates. Despite this, management remains optimistic, focusing on client penetration and winning new customers. Revenue per client increased by 218% to $85,000 from $39,000, with thousands of new logos won. The company's efforts in client growth, referred to as Project Land, helped secure a major bank as a client. The company provides training services in leadership, individual effectiveness, and business execution. Management is confident that these strategies will enhance future earnings as they reaffirm guidance for the current fiscal year.

news.headline: UK House of Commons speaker grants urgent question to ask finance minister on the growing pressure of borrowing costs on the public finances.
